title: 20 FUNimation dub voices
wikitext:
[]: 2.0 FUNimation dub voices (No spoilers)             Quote Post by roblucci01 » Tue Dec 08, 2009 4:55 pm Now that 1.0 has been dubbed in English, I wanted to sort of get peoples opinions on the voices for the characters in the Evangelion 2.0 dub that have not been confirmed yet. Basically, which voice actors/ actresses do you think should do voices Asuka, Kaji, and Mari? Looking at FUNimations roster I can honestly say there are quite a few lovely choices out there that would work quite well. As for Mari, I think Caitlin Glass would be an excellent choice. She voiced Haruhi Fujioka in the dub of OHSHC and seems to have that kind of tone to her voice that would it Mari quite well. If anyone wants an example to what she sounds like in the dub, I might recommend lurking on FUNimations youtube channel. They have posted official and legal episodes from the show on their page. Kaji is kind of any easy one. Eric Vale could do a great voice, considering he has that sort of laid-back tone which Kaji sort of embodies. I'm basing this off his performance as Sanji in the non-butchered FUNimation dub of One Piece. Finally, I would say Asuka is a tough one. Aside from sticking with Tiffany Grant (which FUNimation will probably do anyway), I think a possible voice could be the OTHER Haruhi (Suzumiya, that is) from the Bandai dub. I believe her name is Wendy Lee (Don't quote me on that though). So who do you think would be a good choice? Post your ideas here!

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Tue Dec 08, 2009 5:08 pm I'd like for Tiffany Grant and Aaron Krohn to reprise their roles. I can probably see Kaji getting a replacement voice but I'd still like it if his role is reprized.

[]:             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa » Tue Dec 08, 2009 6:23 pm Seeing as Tiffany Grant was my most hated actress from the dub I'd love ANYONE but her to do the voice of Asuka. Hell, they could bring in ADV's Gendo and I think it'd be a step up.

[]:             Quote Post by Heromaster111 » Tue Dec 08, 2009 6:26 pm Gendo'sPapa wrote: Seeing as Tiffany Grant was my most hated actress from the dub I'd love ANYONE but her to do the voice of Asuka. Hell, they could bring in ADV's Gendo and I think it'd be a step up.

[]:             Quote Post by Otakon 08 Ikari » Tue Dec 08, 2009 6:30 pm Gendo'sPapa wrote: Seeing as Tiffany Grant was my most hated actress from the dub I'd love ANYONE but her to do the voice of Asuka. Hell, they could bring in ADV's Gendo and I think it'd be a step up.

[]:             Quote Post by Taekmkm » Tue Dec 08, 2009 7:13 pm Maybe Laura Baily as Mari. She has that good, balanced tone. Caitlen's Haruhi tone is too sarcastic and dry for the nympho-Mari.

[]:             Quote Post by Electric Sachiel » Tue Dec 08, 2009 7:16 pm Heromaster111 wrote: Gendo'sPapa wrote: Seeing as Tiffany Grant was my most hated actress from the dub I'd love ANYONE but her to do the voice of Asuka. Hell, they could bring in ADV's Gendo and I think it'd be a step up.

[]:             Quote Post by Taekmkm » Tue Dec 08, 2009 7:43 pm Wendy Lee is nearly impossible, since she's a heavy L.A. associated with Bang Zoom! union work, and FUNI is Texan non-union. Big money difference for not enough reward.

[]:             Quote Post by Heromaster111 » Tue Dec 08, 2009 10:20 pm Taekmkm wrote: Maybe Laura Baily as Mari. She has that good, balanced tone. Caitlen's Haruhi tone is too sarcastic and dry for the nympho-Mari.

[]:             Quote Post by Dr. Webster » Wed Dec 09, 2009 7:01 pm Joseph the PRPD wrote: I'd like for Tiffany Grant and Aaron Krohn to reprise their roles.

[]:             Quote Post by Azathoth » Wed Dec 09, 2009 7:26 pm Dr. Webster wrote: Yep. While Tiffany may not be the most well-received VA around here, I still think she's very effective at bringing Asuka to life.

[]:             Quote Post by evaunit13 » Wed Dec 09, 2009 7:27 pm i'd like tiffany to stay as Asuka. she brought her bitchyness out, and while it's probably because i'm not used to wendy lee as Asuka, i don't think she'd be an effective Asuka reminded me of this

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Wed Dec 09, 2009 7:33 pm Azathoth wrote: Grant is just weak at it.

[]:             Quote Post by evaunit13 » Wed Dec 09, 2009 7:40 pm Joseph the PRPD wrote: Azathoth wrote: Grant is just weak at it.

[]:             Quote Post by Azathoth » Wed Dec 09, 2009 7:45 pm Joseph the PRPD wrote: " I DON'T WANT TO DIIIIIIIIIIIIIIIIIIIIIIIIIIIE " in EoE gave me goosebumps.

[]:             Quote Post by Dr. Webster » Wed Dec 09, 2009 9:13 pm Joseph the PRPD wrote: Azathoth wrote: Grant is just weak at it.

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Wed Dec 09, 2009 9:18 pm Dr. Webster wrote: It's actually the part where she's whispering that line over and over that really got me. You need to crank the volume up, but it seems she put a lot of emotion into the way she delivered those.

[]:             Quote Post by roblucci01 » Wed Dec 09, 2009 9:45 pm I actually thought Tiffany Grant was a rather decent Asuka. Although I would like someone new just for a little variation.

[]:             Quote Post by GasmaskAvenger » Wed Dec 09, 2009 10:15 pm Oh yeah that was pretty chilling & well executed on Grant's part, as well as her scream when the faux spear attacks her & Unit 02

[]:             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Wed Dec 09, 2009 11:45 pm Joseph the PRPD wrote: I'd like for Tiffany Grant and Aaron Krohn to reprise their roles. I can probably see Kaji getting a replacement voice but I'd still like it if his role is reprized.
